pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.1.7.RELEASE to 3.2.2 to support JDK 21 and Jakarta EE 9+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support JDK 21 and uses javax.* packages, causing compilation failures on JDK 21 with Jakarta EE dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler targets JDK 11, preventing the use of JDK 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities with libraries expecting JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set Maven compiler source and target to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the project compiles with JDK 21 language features and bytecode compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Servlet API dependency to replace removed javax.servlet API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE 9+ (jakarta.servlet), so code or dependencies relying on javax.servlet will fail to compile or link.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JJWT library to 0.12.3 to support Jakarta EE namespaces.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JJWT versions depend on javax.servlet, causing classpath conflicts or compilation errors in a Jakarta EE environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade ModelMapper to 3.0.0 for compatibility with newer Java versions and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older ModelMapper versions may have compatibility issues with JDK 21 or Spring Boot 3's internal changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit Lombok version 1.18.30 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may not support JDK 21 annotation processing correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Liquibase to 4.25.0 for compatibility with Spring Boot 3 and JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Liquibase versions may not be compatible with Spring Boot 3's auto-configuration or JDK 21.
